creator: i18rabbit@yahoo.com
text:
Hi, I upgrade my ports from 9.1 to 9.2, and now I have no mouse cursor in X.
 No errors or visible problems other than this.  I am not a newbie, having
 used FBSD since 1995, though I did move from 4.11 to 9.1.
 
 I read that the cursor was embedded in a X library, and that I shouldn't
 have this problem.  The mouse is working in X, just no cursor.  The
 X cursors font loads fine in xfd.  I really don't know what to do,
 except possibly recompile xorg-minimal, but this takes me 2 days.
 
 If you have any tests you would like me to perform, let me know.
 I'm running VTWM.
